## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (the suite runs without a Mac/Photos library).
- [ ] No real coordinates, home location, or personal `trips.json` in the diff,
      tests, or description — used `phototrips --demo` / synthetic fixtures.
- [ ] If I edited `README.md`, I updated `README.zh-CN.md` and `README.ko.md`
      (or noted why not).
